rationale: The two papers are topically adjacent (both study consumer creativity/concept development), and the cited paper could plausibly serve as background on consumer creative processes (constraints, competence/autonomy). However, the provided evidence includes only a bibliography DOI match with no in-text citation context, and the citing paper’s core contribution (measuring emergent nature for participant selection) is not clearly tied to the cited paper’s specific mechanisms or methods. Given this sparse linkage, it is not safe to drop but also not clearly a strong substantive use.
